svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="8lLHJ0ciPa3bGSd2BGPL"> <mxGraphModel dx="3142" dy="1727" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-399" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Sistema schedule-sena
Diagramas UML" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="222" x="20" y="872" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-400" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Estructurales
Estáticos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="154" x="305" y="454" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-401" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Comportamiento

Horario 'Lun 18 May' de Ficha 2491234
en LAB-101 con M. López" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="230" x="823" y="336" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-406" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Diagrama de Componentes" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="251" x="522" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-407" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Arquitectura Modular:
Módulo Calendario, Gestor de Recursos,
Motor de Validación de Conflictos" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="230" x="823" y="512" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-408" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Diagrama de Despliegue" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="232" x="531" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-409" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Infraestructura Tecnológica:

Coordinador crea horario,
Instructor revisa agenda,
Sistema alerta conflicto" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="126" width="215" x="830" y="912" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-412" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Diagrama de Actividades" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="236" x="529" y="1160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ruVnp07Bfd0eRmvoQLsi-413" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=20;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Flujo de Procesos:
Proceso de validación de formulario
pasando por advertencias de capacidad
